_aboutme: ABOUTME: Curated base attacks-per-second by weapon speed tier (no .tpl templates exist in
ABOUTME: the extract, so the engine's per-tier animation base is reproduced here).
(the record's own signed offset). characterAttackSpeedModifier is NOT folded in - it is the
item's separate '+N% Attack Speed' stat. Evidence: the per-record offsets band by tier
across all weapon classes (VeryFast -0.06..0.01 ... VerySlow -0.24..-0.14), so the base is
per tier, not per class - matching the community's per-category-base description.
APS is displayed for weapon classes only; shields and caster off-hands (tier tag
CharacterAttackSpeedAverage) show no APS on cards and are excluded.

pinned.tagAttackSpeedVerySlow: The Guillotine and Death's Reach cards: 1.48 = 1.65 + (-0.17)

provisional.tagAttackSpeedFast: interpolated; needs one grimtools card oracle (e.g. a Fast 1h axe)
provisional.tagAttackSpeedAverage: interpolated; needs one grimtools card oracle (e.g. a scepter)
provisional.tagAttackSpeedModerate: single enemygear staff uses it; mapped to Average pending an oracle
provisional.tagAttackSpeedSlow: interpolated; needs one grimtools card oracle (e.g. a Slow 2h mace)
